name: Beaverton Coin & Currency
description_short: Independent, veteran-owned coin and currency dealer in Beaverton, OR specializing in bullion, rare coins, and collectible currency with 30+ years of experience.
description_long:
Beaverton Coin & Currency is an independent, veteran-owned business located in Beaverton, Oregon, with over 30 years of experience in the numismatic and precious metals industry. The company operates from a physical storefront at 3803 SW Hall Blvd and maintains an active online presence through their website.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services centered on coins, currency, and precious metals. They buy and sell bullion gold, silver, and platinum at nationally competitive prices. Their inventory includes thousands of collector coins ranging from common circulation pieces to key-date rarities, as well as rare and historic coins. They provide full-service evaluation and appraisal services for coins, rare coins, and collectible currency. Additionally, they stock collectible currency-related supplies and offer price information assistance on all categories of gold, silver, rare, and historic coins.

Beaverton Coin & Currency distinguishes itself through professional credentials and industry standing. They are licensed, insured, and hold memberships in the American Numismatic Association (A.N.A.) and the Professional Numismatists Guild (P.N.N.A.), indicating adherence to industry standards. The business emphasizes its veteran ownership and deep experience in the field, positioning itself as both a strong buyer of rare coins and collectible currency and a reliable source for consultation.

The business operates on a traditional retail schedule (Tuesday-Saturday, 10 AM-5 PM) and accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, and credit cards (bullion transactions excluded from credit card payments). While the website lacks customer reviews or detailed pricing information, the emphasis on credentials, industry memberships, and appraisal services suggests a legitimate numismatic business rather than a typical high-pressure pawn operation.
pros: Licensed and insured with memberships in A.N.A. and P.N.N.A., indicating professional standards and credibility
Over 30 years of combined experience in coins, bullion, and collectible currency
Stocks thousands of collector coins with inventory spanning common to key-date rarities
Offers full-service appraisal and evaluation services for coins and collectible currency
Provides price information assistance on all types of precious metals and rare coins
Nationally competitive buy-sell pricing for bullion and rare coins
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, and credit cards
cons: Limited hours of operation (Tuesday-Saturday only, closed Sunday and Monday) may be inconvenient for some customers
No visible customer reviews or testimonials on website to verify service quality
Credit cards not accepted for bullion transactions, limiting payment flexibility for larger purchases
Website lacks detailed pricing information or inventory listings, requiring customers to call or visit in person
Sparse online information about specific appraisal fees or service costs
best_for: Collectors seeking to buy, sell, or appraise rare coins and historic currency
Individuals with bullion (gold, silver, platinum) looking for competitive pricing and a licensed buyer
People requiring professional numismatic appraisals for insurance, estate, or authentication purposes
Buyers of collectible currency supplies and numismatic-related materials
diagnosis: Beaverton Coin & Currency is best suited for serious numismatic collectors, precious metals investors, and individuals needing professional coin appraisals who value industry credentials and expertise. The main caveat is that this is a specialty collector-focused business, not a quick-transaction pawn shop, requiring in-person visits during limited hours and offering minimal online transparency regarding inventory and pricing.
services: Buying and selling of collector coins (common to key-date rarities)
Bullion gold, silver, and platinum sales at competitive prices
Full-service coin, rare coin, and collectible currency evaluation
Professional appraisal services for coins and collectible currency
Rare coin and collectible currency acquisition (strong buyer)
Price information assistance on gold, silver, rare, and historic coins
